prompt_INIT_CONFIG_HERE_ANYWAY.message: Whakatuwherahia te konae whirihora i konei ahakoa

prompt_KEYS_TO_IGNORE.message: Whakauru ki te kī(s) ki te kore e aro (comma-separated, ranei tomo ki te mahi)

log_OVERWRITING_CONFIG_AT.message: Te whakariterite i te whakatakotoranga o mua

log_DEFAULT_CONFIG_CREATED_AT.message: I hangaia te whirihoranga ngoikore i roto i te

log_IGNORED_KEYS.message: Ko te kī kore e mōhiotia (s)

log_NO_NEW_KEYS_ADDED.message: Kaore he kī hou i taapirihia (katoa kua tae mai)

log_ALL_JSON_UPDATED.message: Katoa nga konae JSON kua whakahoutia angitu

log_TO_CREATE_DEFAULT_CONFIG.message: ki te hanga i te kōnae whirihora taunoa

log_FOR_AVAIL_OPTIONS.message: mō ngā kōwhiringa e wātea ana

tip_FOR_MORE_HELP_VISIT.message: Mō ētahi atu āwhina, haere mai

tip_MOVE_CONFIG_TO_ROOT.message: Whakawhiti i te kōnae whirihora ki te pakiaka o te kaupapa e hiahia ana koe ki te whakamahi i te reira i roto i

tip_IT_HAS_VALID_JSON.message: kei roto i te JSON whaimana

tip_USE_A_VPN.message: Whakamahia he VPN hei whakahou i te API throttling

warn_CONFIG_EXISTS_AT.message: Kei te noho tonu a Config

warn_DIR_NOT_FOUND.message: Kaore e taea te kimi i te aratohu

warn_NO_PROJECT_ROOT_FOUND.message: Kaore he pakiaka kaupapa i kitea

err_PARSE_FAILED.message: E kore e taea e koe te mahi i te paru

err_TRANSLATE_FAILED_FOR_KEY.message: Kua kore e taea te whakamaori mo te kī

err_EN_LOC_NOT_FOUND_AT.message: Ko te rohe Ingarihi kaore i kitea

err_INVALID_KEY.message: Ko te kī kore e tika

help_LOCALES_DIR.message: Ingoa o te kōpaki kei roto i ngā kōnae rohe (taunoa: "_locales")

help_TARGET_LANGS.message: Reo ki te whakamaori ki (hei tauira "es,fr") (taunoa: katoa 100+ rohe tautoko)

help_KEYS.message: Kī ki te whakamaori (hei tauira "taupānga_DESC, err_NOT_FOUND") (taunoa: i kitea katoa nga kī src ngaro i roto i ngā kōnae whaainga)

help_EXCLUDE_KEYS.message: Kī ki te kore e aro (hei tauira "taupānga_ingoa,kaituhi")

help_ONLY_STABLE.message: Whakamahia anake nga rohe pumau (skip auto-discovery)

help_CONFIG.message: Whakamahia te kōnae whirihora ritenga (hei tauira "ara/ki/kōnae")

help_INIT.message: Hanga .translate-msgs.config.json5 kōnae ki te rokiroki kōwhiringa taunoa

help_FORCE.message: Whakauruhia te konae whirihoranga o mua i te wa e whakamahi ana i te init

help_NO_WIZARD.message: Ngā tohutohu whakawhitiwhiti i te wā o te tīmatanga
